purpose: Non-destructively reconcile a partial or copied-only schema package using the AGENTS-schema-gov2gov-migration model, then return the resulting schema reality state.

workspace_root.description: Workspace root to inspect and reconcile.

expected_schema_package.description: Expected schema family or package name.

schema_reality_state.description: Input state from is_schema_real_or_shadow_copied. This function is not the bootstrap lane for fully missing packages.

active_reasons.description: Reason list from the active schema reality state.

startup_surfaces.description: Optional startup or package surfaces that should align with the schema package.

migration_mode.description: Plan changes only, or apply only non-destructive reconciliation steps.

migration_result_state.description: Current outcome of the gov2gov-backed reconciliation lane.

planned_actions.description: Ordered non-destructive actions proposed from the migration contract.

actions_taken.description: Actions actually taken when migration_mode is non_destructive_apply.

touched_surfaces.description: Files or surfaces reviewed or updated during reconciliation.

audit_needed.description: Places where the contract found real divergence, ambiguity, or unresolved migration pressure that should be surfaced for audit rather than auto-resolved.

remaining_findings.description: Residual issues that keep the package from being fully real after this pass.

resulting_schema_reality_state.description: Schema reality state after planning or applying the gov2gov migration lane.
